Query.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", C.CASE_TYPE AS "C.CASE_TYPE", C.STATUS AS "C.STATUS", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME", C.RECEIPT_DATE AS "C.RECEIPT_DATE", C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED_CURRENCY AS "C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED_CURRENCY", C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED AS "C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED", C.COURT_FEE_CURRENCY AS "C.COURT_FEE_CURRENCY", C.COURT_FEE AS "C.COURT_FEE", C.SOLICITORS_COSTS_CURRENCY AS "C.SOLICITORS_COSTS_CURRENCY", C.SOLICITORS_COSTS AS "C.SOLICITORS_COSTS", C.TOTAL_CURRENCY AS "C.TOTAL_CURRENCY", C.TOTAL AS "C.TOTAL", C.DATE_OF_ISSUE AS "C.DATE_OF_ISSUE", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OBLIGATIONS WHERE CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER ) AS "C.OBLIGS_COUNT", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WINDOW_FOR_TRIAL WHERE WFT_CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER ) AS "C.WFT_COUNT" FROM CASES C, COURTS CT WHERE CT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber}

Query.Join: CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+)= CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE
